vpnSync_infoAriaLabel.message: More info about Sync with VPN

vpnSync_tooltip.message: This is a one-time sync to your current public IP location. It does not auto-update when your VPN changes servers — use Re-sync to update manually.

vpnSync_detectedIp.description: Shown after a successful VPN sync. $IP$ is the detected public IP address.

vpnSync_networkError.message: A network error occurred. Please try again.

search_setLocationFailed.message: Failed to set location. Please try again.

coords_invalidLat.message: Invalid latitude. Must be between -90 and 90.

coords_invalidLon.message: Invalid longitude. Must be between -180 and 180.

warning_noLocationSet.message: ⚠️ Protection enabled but no location set

warning_refreshPage.message: ⚠️ Refresh this page to apply protection

notice_restrictedPage.message: ℹ️ Extensions cannot run on this page

webrtc_configFailed.message: Failed to configure WebRTC protection. Check extension permissions.

details_webrtcActive.message:
✓ Active

RTCPeerConnection is wrapped to suppress ICE candidate gathering.
This prevents WebRTC from leaking your real IP address.

details_webrtcInactive.message:
✗ Inactive

WebRTC can leak your real IP address even when using a VPN.
